mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees (name, email, phone, position, hire_date, salary, department_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{position}, #{hireDate}, #{salary}, #{departmentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, position = #{position}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, salary = #{salary}, department_id = #{departmentId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
